panels.description: libvirtd_exporter 기준으로 재구성한 VM 메모리/디스크 테이블

targets.expr: ((sum by (instance, uuid) (libvirtd_domain_balloon_available{instance=~"$instance.*", uuid=~"$uuid"})) * 1024) + on(uuid) group_left(name) (0 * max by (uuid, name) (openstack_vm_identity{uuid=~"$uuid"}))

((sum by (instance, uuid) (clamp_min(libvirtd_domain_balloon_available{instance=~"$instance.*", uuid=~"$uuid"} - libvirtd_domain_balloon_usable{instance=~"$instance.*", uuid=~"$uuid"}, 0))) * 1024) + on(uuid) group_left(name) (0 * max by (uuid, name) (openstack_vm_identity{uuid=~"$uuid"}))

(100 * sum by (instance, uuid) (clamp_min(libvirtd_domain_balloon_available{instance=~"$instance.*", uuid=~"$uuid"} - libvirtd_domain_balloon_usable{instance=~"$instance.*", uuid=~"$uuid"}, 0)) / sum by (instance, uuid) (libvirtd_domain_balloon_available{instance=~"$instance.*", uuid=~"$uuid"})) + on(uuid) group_left(name) (0 * max by (uuid, name) (openstack_vm_identity{uuid=~"$uuid"}))
(sum by (instance, uuid) (libvirtd_domain_block_physical{instance=~"$instance.*", uuid=~"$uuid"})) + on(uuid) group_left(name) (0 * max by (uuid, name) (openstack_vm_identity{uuid=~"$uuid"}))

panels.title: RAM and Disk usage on VM (VM name 기준)

targets.expr: sum by (instance)(irate(node_cpu_seconds_total{mode="system",instance=~"$instance.*",job="node-exporter"}[5m])) * 100
sum by (instance)(irate(node_cpu_seconds_total{mode="user",instance=~"$instance.*",job="node-exporter"}[5m])) * 100
sum by (instance)(irate(node_cpu_seconds_total{mode="iowait",instance=~"$instance.*",job="node-exporter"}[5m])) * 100
sum by (instance)(irate(node_cpu_seconds_total{mode=~".*irq",instance=~"$instance.*",job="node-exporter"}[5m])) * 100
sum by (instance)(irate(node_cpu_seconds_total{mode!="idle",mode!="user",mode!="system",mode!="iowait",mode!="irq",mode!="softirq",instance=~"$instance.*",job="node-exporter"}[5m])) * 100
sum by (instance)(irate(node_cpu_seconds_total{mode="idle",instance=~"$instance.*",job="node-exporter"}[5m])) * 100
node_vgs_size_bytes{instance=~"$instance.*", vg="data"}
node_vgs_size_bytes{instance=~"$instance.*", vg="data"} - node_vgs_free_bytes{instance=~"$instance.*", vg="data"}
((node_vgs_size_bytes{instance=~"$instance.*", vg="data"} - node_vgs_free_bytes{instance=~"$instance.*", vg="data"})/node_vgs_size_bytes{instance=~"$instance.*", vg="data"}) * 100
node_memory_MemFree_bytes{instance=~"$instance.*",job="node-exporter"}

panels.title: Memory Stats (by instance and VM name)

targets.expr: (100 * clamp_min(libvirtd_domain_balloon_available{instance=~"$instance.*", uuid=~"$uuid"} - libvirtd_domain_balloon_usable{instance=~"$instance.*", uuid=~"$uuid"}, 0) / libvirtd_domain_balloon_available{instance=~"$instance.*", uuid=~"$uuid"}) + on(uuid) group_left(name) (0 * max by (uuid, name) (openstack_vm_identity{uuid=~"$uuid"}))
(libvirtd_domain_balloon_available{instance=~"$instance.*", uuid=~"$uuid"} * 1024) + on(uuid) group_left(name) (0 * max by (uuid, name) (openstack_vm_identity{uuid=~"$uuid"}))
(libvirtd_domain_balloon_usable{instance=~"$instance.*", uuid=~"$uuid"} * 1024) + on(uuid) group_left(name) (0 * max by (uuid, name) (openstack_vm_identity{uuid=~"$uuid"}))
(libvirtd_domain_balloon_unused{instance=~"$instance.*", uuid=~"$uuid"} * 1024) + on(uuid) group_left(name) (0 * max by (uuid, name) (openstack_vm_identity{uuid=~"$uuid"}))
(libvirtd_domain_balloon_current{instance=~"$instance.*", uuid=~"$uuid"} * 1024) + on(uuid) group_left(name) (0 * max by (uuid, name) (openstack_vm_identity{uuid=~"$uuid"}))
(libvirtd_domain_balloon_disk_caches{instance=~"$instance.*", uuid=~"$uuid"} * 1024) + on(uuid) group_left(name) (0 * max by (uuid, name) (openstack_vm_identity{uuid=~"$uuid"}))
(libvirtd_domain_balloon_major_fault{instance=~"$instance.*", uuid=~"$uuid"}) + on(uuid) group_left(name) (0 * max by (uuid, name) (openstack_vm_identity{uuid=~"$uuid"}))
(libvirtd_domain_balloon_minor_fault{instance=~"$instance.*", uuid=~"$uuid"}) + on(uuid) group_left(name) (0 * max by (uuid, name) (openstack_vm_identity{uuid=~"$uuid"}))
(libvirtd_domain_balloon_rss{instance=~"$instance.*", uuid=~"$uuid"} * 1024) + on(uuid) group_left(name) (0 * max by (uuid, name) (openstack_vm_identity{uuid=~"$uuid"}))

panels.title: Interface Stats (by instance and VM name)

targets.expr: (sum by (uuid) (irate(libvirtd_domain_net_tx_bytes{instance=~"$instance.*", uuid=~"$uuid"}[5m]))) + on(uuid) group_left(name) (0 * max by (uuid, name) (openstack_vm_identity{uuid=~"$uuid"}))
(sum by (uuid) (irate(libvirtd_domain_net_rx_bytes{instance=~"$instance.*", uuid=~"$uuid"}[5m]))) + on(uuid) group_left(name) (0 * max by (uuid, name) (openstack_vm_identity{uuid=~"$uuid"}))
(sum by (uuid) (rate(libvirtd_domain_net_rx_packets{instance=~"$instance.*", uuid=~"$uuid"}[5m]))) + on(uuid) group_left(name) (0 * max by (uuid, name) (openstack_vm_identity{uuid=~"$uuid"}))
(sum by (uuid) (rate(libvirtd_domain_net_tx_packets{instance=~"$instance.*", uuid=~"$uuid"}[5m]))) + on(uuid) group_left(name) (0 * max by (uuid, name) (openstack_vm_identity{uuid=~"$uuid"}))
(sum by (uuid) (rate(libvirtd_domain_net_tx_drop{instance=~"$instance.*", uuid=~"$uuid"}[5m]))) + on(uuid) group_left(name) (0 * max by (uuid, name) (openstack_vm_identity{uuid=~"$uuid"}))
(sum by (uuid) (rate(libvirtd_domain_net_rx_drop{instance=~"$instance.*", uuid=~"$uuid"}[5m]))) + on(uuid) group_left(name) (0 * max by (uuid, name) (openstack_vm_identity{uuid=~"$uuid"}))
(sum by (uuid) (rate(libvirtd_domain_net_rx_errors{instance=~"$instance.*", uuid=~"$uuid"}[5m]))) + on(uuid) group_left(name) (0 * max by (uuid, name) (openstack_vm_identity{uuid=~"$uuid"}))
(sum by (uuid) (rate(libvirtd_domain_net_tx_errors{instance=~"$instance.*", uuid=~"$uuid"}[5m]))) + on(uuid) group_left(name) (0 * max by (uuid, name) (openstack_vm_identity{uuid=~"$uuid"}))

panels.title: Domain Info (by instance and VM name)

targets.expr: (libvirtd_domain_balloon_maximum{instance=~"$instance.*", uuid=~"$uuid"} * 1024) + on(uuid) group_left(name) (0 * max by (uuid, name) (openstack_vm_identity{uuid=~"$uuid"}))
(libvirtd_domain_balloon_current{instance=~"$instance.*", uuid=~"$uuid"} * 1024) + on(uuid) group_left(name) (0 * max by (uuid, name) (openstack_vm_identity{uuid=~"$uuid"}))
(count by (uuid) (libvirtd_domain_vcpu_state{instance=~"$instance.*", uuid=~"$uuid"})) + on(uuid) group_left(name) (0 * max by (uuid, name) (openstack_vm_identity{uuid=~"$uuid"}))
(libvirtd_domain_domain_state{instance=~"$instance.*", uuid=~"$uuid"}) + on(uuid) group_left(name) (0 * max by (uuid, name) (openstack_vm_identity{uuid=~"$uuid"}))
(libvirtd_domain_domain_state_reason{instance=~"$instance.*", uuid=~"$uuid"}) + on(uuid) group_left(name) (0 * max by (uuid, name) (openstack_vm_identity{uuid=~"$uuid"}))

panels.title: Block Stats (by instance and VM name)

targets.expr: (sum by (uuid) (irate(libvirtd_domain_block_write_requests{instance=~"$instance.*", uuid=~"$uuid"}[5m]))) + on(uuid) group_left(name) (0 * max by (uuid, name) (openstack_vm_identity{uuid=~"$uuid"}))
(sum by (uuid) (irate(libvirtd_domain_block_read_requests{instance=~"$instance.*", uuid=~"$uuid"}[5m]))) + on(uuid) group_left(name) (0 * max by (uuid, name) (openstack_vm_identity{uuid=~"$uuid"}))
(sum by (uuid) (irate(libvirtd_domain_block_write_times{instance=~"$instance.*", uuid=~"$uuid"}[5m]))) + on(uuid) group_left(name) (0 * max by (uuid, name) (openstack_vm_identity{uuid=~"$uuid"}))
(sum by (uuid) (irate(libvirtd_domain_block_read_times{instance=~"$instance.*", uuid=~"$uuid"}[5m]))) + on(uuid) group_left(name) (0 * max by (uuid, name) (openstack_vm_identity{uuid=~"$uuid"}))
(sum by (uuid) (irate(libvirtd_domain_block_write_bytes{instance=~"$instance.*", uuid=~"$uuid"}[5m]))) + on(uuid) group_left(name) (0 * max by (uuid, name) (openstack_vm_identity{uuid=~"$uuid"}))
(sum by (uuid) (irate(libvirtd_domain_block_read_bytes{instance=~"$instance.*", uuid=~"$uuid"}[5m]))) + on(uuid) group_left(name) (0 * max by (uuid, name) (openstack_vm_identity{uuid=~"$uuid"}))
(sum by (uuid) (irate(libvirtd_domain_block_flush_requests{instance=~"$instance.*", uuid=~"$uuid"}[5m]))) + on(uuid) group_left(name) (0 * max by (uuid, name) (openstack_vm_identity{uuid=~"$uuid"}))

panels.description: Physical size in bytes of backing image

targets.expr: (sum by (uuid) (libvirtd_domain_block_physical{instance=~"$instance.*", uuid=~"$uuid"})) + on(uuid) group_left(name) (0 * max by (uuid, name) (openstack_vm_identity{uuid=~"$uuid"}))

panels.title: Physical size of image

panels.description: Total time (ns) spent on cache flushing

targets.expr: (sum by (uuid) (irate(libvirtd_domain_block_flush_times{instance=~"$instance.*", uuid=~"$uuid"}[5m]))) + on(uuid) group_left(name) (0 * max by (uuid, name) (openstack_vm_identity{uuid=~"$uuid"}))

panels.title: Flush time

targets.expr: (sum by (uuid) (libvirtd_domain_block_allocation{instance=~"$instance.*", uuid=~"$uuid"})) + on(uuid) group_left(name) (0 * max by (uuid, name) (openstack_vm_identity{uuid=~"$uuid"}))

panels.description: Logical size in bytes of block device

targets.expr: (sum by (uuid) (libvirtd_domain_block_capacity{instance=~"$instance.*", uuid=~"$uuid"})) + on(uuid) group_left(name) (0 * max by (uuid, name) (openstack_vm_identity{uuid=~"$uuid"}))

panels.title: Logical size of block device
CPU Stats (by instance and VM name)

panels.description: VM 전체 CPU 사용량. 1 vCPU를 100%로 환산하므로 멀티 vCPU VM은 100%를 넘을 수 있습니다.

targets.expr: ((rate(libvirtd_domain_cpu_time{instance=~"$instance.*", uuid=~"$uuid"}[5m]) / 1e9) * 100) + on(uuid) group_left(name) (0 * max by (uuid, name) (openstack_vm_identity{uuid=~"$uuid"}))

panels.title: VM CPU usage (% of one core)

panels.description: 할당된 vCPU 수로 정규화한 CPU 사용률입니다. on(instance, uuid) 매칭으로 분모/분자 라벨셋 차이를 맞췄습니다.

targets.expr: (((100 * rate(libvirtd_domain_cpu_time{instance=~"$instance.*", uuid=~"$uuid"}[5m])) / 1e9) / on(instance, uuid) count by (instance, uuid) (libvirtd_domain_vcpu_state{instance=~"$instance.*", uuid=~"$uuid"})) + on(uuid) group_left(name) (0 * max by (uuid, name) (openstack_vm_identity{uuid=~"$uuid"}))

panels.title: VM CPU usage (% of provisioned vCPU)

panels.description: vCPU별 CPU 사용률입니다. 특정 VM을 선택해서 볼 때 가장 유용합니다.

targets.expr: ((rate(libvirtd_domain_vcpu_time{instance=~"$instance.*", uuid=~"$uuid"}[5m]) / 1e9) * 100) + on(uuid) group_left(name) (0 * max by (uuid, name) (openstack_vm_identity{uuid=~"$uuid"}))

panels.title: VM vCPU usage (per vCPU)

title: Libvirtd (OpenStack-Helm compatible) (VM name mapped) + VM CPU
description: Adapted from the original Libvirt dashboard to work with vexxhost/libvirtd_exporter deployed by OpenStack-Helm. UUID-based panels were joined with openstack_vm_identity to display VM names.
